name: Light & Wonder Inc.
analysis: LNW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$128.3400, stop A$112.5828, target A$145.0000 (1.06:1) — then trail it.
